text: The Adam optimizer calculates adaptive per-parameter learning rates by maintaining exponentially decaying averages of gradients and squared gradients.
The Adam optimizer determines variable learning rates for each parameter by keeping track of exponentially weighted averages of the gradients and their squares.
The Adam optimizer adjusts individual learning rates for each parameter by monitoring the exponentially weighted averages of the gradients and their squares.
The Adam optimizer modifies the learning rate for each parameter separately, based on the exponentially weighted averages of the gradients and the squares of the gradients.
